message:
docs: update T6.9 contracts — C-RTY-03 connection pool retry implemented

Mark C-RTY-03 as implemented (get_with_retry in pool.rs), close RTY-G2
gap, update retry domain summary counts (4/5 implemented).

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -51,7 +51,8 @@
           "bounded_by_connection_timeout",
           "cancel_safe"
         ],
-        "status": "not_implemented"
+        "reference": "src/database/pool.rs::get_with_retry",
+        "status": "implemented"
       },
       {
         "id": "C-RTY-04",
@@ -339,7 +340,7 @@
   "summary": {
     "total_contracts": 19,
     "domains": {
-      "retry": {"count": 5, "implemented": 3, "partial": 0, "defined": 1, "not_implemented": 1},
+      "retry": {"count": 5, "implemented": 4, "partial": 0, "defined": 1, "not_implemented": 0},
       "error_classification": {"count": 3, "implemented": 3, "partial": 0, "defined": 0, "not_implemented": 0},
       "idempotency": {"count": 3, "implemented": 0, "partial": 1, "defined": 1, "not_implemented": 1},
       "delivery": {"count": 3, "implemented": 0, "partial": 0, "defined": 3, "not_implemented": 0},
@@ -352,7 +353,7 @@
       {"id": "ERR-G1", "severity": "closed", "description": "MySQL/SQLite error classification methods — IMPLEMENTED"},
       {"id": "ERR-G2", "severity": "closed", "description": "PostgreSQL is_transient/is_connection_error — IMPLEMENTED"},
       {"id": "ERR-G3", "severity": "closed", "description": "Messaging error classification methods — IMPLEMENTED"},
-      {"id": "RTY-G2", "severity": "medium", "description": "Connection pool retry not implemented"},
+      {"id": "RTY-G2", "severity": "closed", "description": "Connection pool retry — IMPLEMENTED via get_with_retry()"},
       {"id": "IMP-G1", "severity": "low", "description": "Request-level idempotency keys not implemented"}
     ]
   },

@@ -283,7 +283,7 @@ Timeouts MUST act as backpressure release valves:
 | PostgreSQL transaction retry | Implemented | `src/database/transaction.rs` |
 | MySQL transaction retry | Implemented | `src/database/transaction.rs` |
 | SQLite transaction retry | Implemented | `src/database/transaction.rs` |
-| Connection pool retry | NOT IMPLEMENTED | — |
+| Connection pool retry | Implemented | `src/database/pool.rs` (`get_with_retry`) |
 
 ### Error Classification Status
